name: Eaton Tripp Lite series 48V Extended Battery Module (EBM) for 750VA, 1000VA and 1500VA SmartPro UPS Systems, 2U Rack/Tower - 48 V DC - Lead Acid - Valve-regulated/User Replaceable - Hot Swappable
shortName: Eaton Tripp Lite series 48V Extended Battery Module (EBM) for 750VA
